title: This AI founder walked away from a $300,000 life in San Francisco: 'No money could make me stay here'
summary_full: Koby Conrad, founder of AI sobriety companion Sunflower, relocated to Buenos Aires. He found a better environment for building a family and his company. Conrad enjoys the city's culture, food, and significantly lower living costs. He feels more focused and productive away from San Francisco's tech-centric atmosphere. The move supports his desire to balance ambitious work with raising a family.
